title: Update `tag` documentation regarding 'alias' usage
body:
The word `alias` is not very common when speaking about image names and
tags. So we just refer to image name as the overall identifier of an
image.

Refers to https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4712#discussion_r358463230

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Rebased on top of the latest master branch.
There was a test error in package for centos and I don't know how to restart it?
